alerts.name: Stale Windows Device Alert (30+ days)
alerts.description: Windows device has not synced with Intune in over 30 days. View Stale Devices Workbook
alerts.kql_query: let StaleDevices = IntuneManagedDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | where OperatingSystem startswith "Windows" | extend LastSyncDaysAgo = datetime_diff('day', now(), todatetime(LastSyncDateTime)) | where LastSyncDaysAgo > toint({StaleDays}); let UsersByUPN = IntuneUsers_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName; let UsersByIdLookup = IntuneUsers_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId; StaleDevices | join kind=leftouter (UsersByUPN | project UserPrincipalName, PrimaryAccountEnabled = AccountEnabled, Department, JobTitle, OfficeLocation, City, State, Country, Mail, LastSignInDateTime, LastNonInteractiveSignInDateTime) on UserPrincipalName | join kind=leftouter (UsersByIdLookup | project LastLoggedOnUserId = UserId, LastLogonUserUPN = UserPrincipalName, LastLogonUserName = DisplayName, LastLogonDepartment = Department, LastLogonJobTitle = JobTitle, LastLogonMail = Mail, LastLogonOffice = OfficeLocation, LastLogonCity = City, LastLogonCountry = Country, LastLogonAccountEnabled = AccountEnabled, LastLogonLastSignIn = LastSignInDateTime) on LastLoggedOnUserId | extend BestKnownUser = coalesce(LastLogonUserUPN, UserPrincipalName, "No Data"), BestKnownUserName = coalesce(LastLogonUserName, UserDisplayName, "No Data"), BestKnownDept = coalesce(LastLogonDepartment, Department, "No Data"), BestKnownJobTitle = coalesce(LastLogonJobTitle, JobTitle, "No Data"), BestKnownMail = coalesce(LastLogonMail, Mail, EmailAddress, "No Data"), BestKnownOffice = coalesce(LastLogonOffice, OfficeLocation, "No Data"), BestKnownCity = coalesce(LastLogonCity, City, "No Data"), BestKnownCountry = coalesce(LastLogonCountry, Country, "No Data"), BestKnownAccountEnabled = coalesce(LastLogonAccountEnabled, PrimaryAccountEnabled) | extend Severity = case(LastSyncDaysAgo > 180, "Critical", LastSyncDaysAgo > 90, "High", LastSyncDaysAgo > 60, "Medium", "Low") | extend RecommendedAction = case(BestKnownAccountEnabled == false and LastSyncDaysAgo > 90, "Retire", isempty(UserPrincipalName) and isempty(LastLoggedOnUserId) and LastSyncDaysAgo > 90, "Retire", LastSyncDaysAgo > 180, "Retire", LastSyncDaysAgo > 90, "Investigate", BestKnownAccountEnabled == false, "Investigate", "Monitor") | project Severity, DeviceName, SerialNumber = coalesce(SerialNumber, "No Data"), Model = coalesce(Model, "No Data"), BestKnownUser, BestKnownDept, BestKnownOffice, LastSyncDaysAgo, ComplianceState = coalesce(ComplianceState, "No Data"), Encrypted = case(IsEncrypted == "true", "Yes", IsEncrypted == "false", "No", "No Data"), RecommendedAction, DeviceId

auto_resolve.resolve_query: IntuneManagedDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | where OperatingSystem startswith "Windows" | extend LastSyncDaysAgo = datetime_diff('day', now(), todatetime(LastSyncDateTime)) | where LastSyncDaysAgo <= toint({StaleDays}) | project DeviceId

alerts.name: Jacob Williams Device Alert
alerts.kql_query: IntuneManagedDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | where UserPrincipalName == '{upn}' | project DeviceId, DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName, LastSyncDateTime, Model, OperatingSystem, ComplianceState, SerialNumber, EnrolledDateTime
